info.name: AutoPartsPro API
info.description:
Complete API collection for AutoPartsPro (ASP.NET Core).

**Setup**
1. Import `AutoPartsPro-Local.postman_environment.json`
2. Run API: `dotnet run` in Autopartspro project (http://localhost:5009)
3. Run **Auth > Login (Admin)** to set `accessToken`

**Default admin:** admin@autopartspro.com / Admin@123

request.description: No auth. Returns API and DB status.
Login as Admin. Saves JWT to accessToken.
Login as Staff. Saves JWT to accessToken.
Login as Customer. Saves JWT to accessToken.

item.name: Staff Portal
item.description: Staff-only for profile; change-password also allows Admin
